ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the employee */,
  "over18" TEXT /* Indicator if the employee is over 18 years old */,
  "employee_number" INTEGER /* Unique number assigned to the employee */,
  "rand" REAL /* Random number for statistical analysis */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the employee */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Disability status of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_history" (
  "job_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job history record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  "job_role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job role */,
  "job_level" INTEGER /* Current job level of the employee */,
  "job_involvement" INTEGER /* Level of job involvement */,
  "job_satisfaction" INTEGER /* Job satisfaction score */,
  "num_companies_worked" INTEGER /* Number of companies the employee has worked for */,
  "years_at_company" INTEGER /* Number of years the employee has been with the company */,
  "years_in_current_role" INTEGER /* Number of years in the current role */,
  "years_since_last_promotion" INTEGER /* Number of years since the last promotion */,
  "years_with_curr_manager" INTEGER /* Number of years with the current manager */,
  "job_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee started the current job */,
  "job_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee ended the current job (if applicable) */,
  "previous_job_role" TEXT /* Job role of the employee before the current one */,
  "promotion_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the employee's promotion (if applicable) */,
  "job_satisfaction_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the employee about their job satisfaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_history_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_history_job_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_role_id") REFERENCES job_roles ("job_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department */,
  "department_head_id" INTEGER /* Employee ID of the department head (foreign key referencing the employees table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_department_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_head_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_roles" (
  "job_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job role */,
  "job_role_name" TEXT /* Name of the job role */,
  "job_role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the job role */,
  "job_role_category" TEXT /* Category of the job role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_ratings" (
  "performance_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance rating */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating score */,
  "performance_year" TEXT /* Year of the performance rating */,
  "performance_rating_description" TEXT /* Description of the performance rating */,
  "rating_scale" TEXT /* Scale used for the performance rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_ratings_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_details" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "monthly_income" INTEGER /* Monthly income of the employee */,
  "monthly_rate" INTEGER /* Monthly rate of the employee */,
  "hourly_rate" INTEGER /* Hourly rate of the employee */,
  "percent_salary_hike" INTEGER /* Percentage salary hike */,
  "bonus_amount" INTEGER /* Bonus amount given to the employee */,
  "stock_options" INTEGER /* Number of stock options granted to the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_details_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_details" (
  "travel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "business_travel" TEXT /* Business travel requirement */,
  "distance_from_home" INTEGER /* Distance from home to work */,
  "travel_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of business travel */,
  "average_daily_distance" INTEGER /* Average daily distance traveled by the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("travel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_details_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "satisfaction_scores" (
  "satisfaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satisfaction record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "environment_satisfaction" INTEGER /* Environment satisfaction score */,
  "relationship_satisfaction" INTEGER /* Relationship satisfaction score */,
  "work_life_balance" INTEGER /* Work-life balance score */,
  "overall_satisfaction" INTEGER /* Overall satisfaction score of the employee */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the employee about their satisfaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satisfaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satisfaction_scores_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_details" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "education_level" INTEGER /* Level of education */,
  "education_field" TEXT /* Field of education */,
  "university_name" TEXT /* Name of the university the employee attended */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee graduated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_details_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_records" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "training_times_last_year" INTEGER /* Number of training times last year */,
  "standard_hours" INTEGER /* Standard hours of training */,
  "stock_option_level" INTEGER /* Stock option level */,
  "training_topic" TEXT /* Topic of the training */,
  "training_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_records_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attrition_records" (
  "attrition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attrition record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "attrition" TEXT /* Attrition status (Yes/No) */,
  "over_time" TEXT /* Overtime status (Yes/No) */,
  "reason_for_attrition" TEXT /* Reason for the employee's attrition */,
  "attrition_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee left the organization (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attrition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attrition_records_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_rates" (
  "daily_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily rate record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "daily_rate" INTEGER /* Daily rate of the employee */,
  "daily_rate_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the daily rate */,
  "daily_rate_effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the daily rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("daily_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_rates_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
